metadata.title: Quick Mid Push Snags Two Clean Kills in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a fast mid push where smart positioning and steady aim turn the tide. Two enemies caught off guard in a blink. Where’s your go-to mid angle?

Drop your favorite mid plays in the comments!
